provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Forensic Procedures Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: the National DNA Database Advisory Board of Botswana established under section 23
a person under the age of 18 years
any process or action necessary for, and related to the collection of forensic material
a person who is unable to give consent for the performance of a forensic procedure on his or her body because of immaturity or unsoundness of mind
the police officer in charge of an investigation into the commission of an offence in relation to which a forensic procedure is carried out or proposed to be carried out
member of the Board appointed in accordance with section 30

a person who is charged with an offence which is punishable by—
( a ) a term of imprisonment of three or more years
